demo_timestamps.description: Building solutions using low code and AI on Autodesk Platform Services
Using Microsoft Power Apps with Power Automate for automating data entry from reinforcement dockets
Using Microsoft Teams and Power Automate for project data interaction and insights
Using Vector to scale interactions with model data and AI analysis in an engineering application

client_mentions.name: Victor
client_mentions.context: Building blocks baked in for Autodesk AC data model

ai_technologies.name: Pinecone

summary: The video explores the integration of low-code and AI technologies with Autodesk Platform Services to scale solutions from proof of concept to production. It highlights the use of tools like Microsoft Power Apps and Vector for task automation and data analysis, emphasizing the importance of developing core processes, collaborating with partners like Autodesk, and leveraging existing roadmaps to enhance usability, trust, and scalability in AI-powered applications.
